caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in large white letters, and a gold watch sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and wears headphones. In the background, a white banner features the text "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated vertically with gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk to his right sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". The man is seen speaking and smiling, with his hands clasped on the table in front of him. Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expression and head posture as he talks, while the camera remains static.
